known_gaps: KiCad DRC pass evidence is gathered with error-severity gating, so warning-only silkscreen/library-parity cleanup remains fabrication-readiness follow-up work.
notes: Promoted KiCad-backed I2C sensor breakout candidate with connector-to-sensor VCC, GND, SDA, and SCL routing plus verified local decoupling and I2C pull-up routing.
